data.title: 国际服活动复刻「The Clumsy Sister and the Magician of the Old Library」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] Catch The Clumsy Sister and the Magician of the Old Library Event Story rerun!
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

Catch The Clumsy Sister and the Magician of the Old Library Event Story rerun!
Help Hinata and Ui restore the mysterious scripture!

🗓️Period: 8/11 (Fri) 2:00 AM – 8/22 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
